Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS NEW AMERICA MEDIA AND ALEXANDRA CLOSE'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

APPEARANCES: Norberto Gaerlan, 408/706-1493 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Tracy C. Lemmon, Esq. of Bragg & Kuluva 273-6500 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEW AMERICA MEDIA. GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALEXANDRA CLOSE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF MUST IDENTIFY A PUBLIC POLICY THAT WAS BREACHED. PLAINTIFF CITES NO BASIS TO HOLD SUPERVISOR LIABLE. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. Plaintiff stated his new address will be: 37494 Glenmoor Drive, Fremont, 94536. Plaintiff to file an official change of address document with the clerk's office. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR #2542
